sections.paragraph:
Mordecai H4782
A Jewish captive in Persia
Est 2:6
Foster father of Esther
Est 2:7
Informs Ahasuerus of a conspiracy against his life, and is rewarded
Est 2:23; Est 6:11
Promoted in Haman's place
Est 8:2; Est 8:15; Est 10:3
Intercedes with Ahasuerus for the Jews; establishes the festival of Purim in commemoration of their deliverance
Est 8
